value.found_quote: Start with [`claude --safe-mode`](/en/cli-reference#cli-flags), which launches a session with all customizations disabled, including `CLAUDE.md`, skills, plugins, hooks, MCP servers, and custom commands and agents.
value.rationale: The page describes `claude --safe-mode` under "Test against a clean configuration," stating it launches a session with all customizations disabled to test against a clean configuration, matching the claim. No deprecation or sunset language is present; it is presented as a current feature (min-version 2.1.169).
